title: PlayerEffect
description: Adds Custom effects to player, great for rewards
body:
# Player Effects
## Add cool custom effects to player!
### Features:
-Customizable particle type to player, bow and kills!

-May be able to hook in economy plugins in the future.

-Supports continuous updates, creating a persistent glowing effect.

### Commands:
**/pe player <player> <particles>** Allows you to choose what player uses what effects.

**/pe bow <player> <particles>** Adds bow effects to player.

**/pe kill <player> <particles>** Adds kill effects to player which apply to all entity.

**/pe block <player> <particles>** Adds block place/dig effects to player.

**/pe clear <player>** Clears effects from a certain player.

### Customize:
- In config file, you can change the effects lasting times
- You can choose the effect lasting time for block and kill
- Manage all player effects by udid

### Why us:
Super lightweighted and highly customizable plugin, great for awarding players

**FOLIA supported!!!**
